data.title: John Deere emphasizes digital scale and connected customers
data.description: Executives said Deere now has more than 1 million connected machines in operation and that its Operations Center platform covers about 500 million engaged acres globally.

data.title: MSupply taps former Ferguson digital leader to speed ecommerce transformation
data.description: For mSupply, adding a seasoned digital leader marks the next phase of that transition — one aimed at turning digital into a primary growth engine rather than a supporting channel.

data.title: Amazon expands AI to curb energy use in grocery fulfillment centers
data.description: The system, which predicts building needs and adjusts equipment in real time, reduced energy use by 15%. That's more than double the project’s initial target, according to the companies.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Gap is using AI
data.description: Gap's latest AI efforts for the holiday season extend personalization and fulfillment work as the retailer figures out how to make its ecommerce offerings as relevant as possible to shoppers.

data.title: Mercado Libre to test humanoid robots in Texas fulfillment center
data.description: Mercado Libre joins a group of companies piloting Digit in industrial environments, including logistics provider GXO, motion-technology manufacturer Schaeffler and Amazon.
